action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 5 eval failed with a soundfile crash (seek/read error on a FLAC file in the hidden test set). The mock local test succeeded, so the issue is test-set-specific audio decoding. Analysis: soundfile/libsndfile can fail on certain FLAC variants. torchaudio (pre-installed) uses a different backend and can often read files that soundfile cannot. Adding a torchaudio fallback in predict.py should make inference robust. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with torchaudio fallback for both duration probing and audio loading. Run local mock test, then immediately submit_eval with the existing best.pt checkpoint to finally get a baseline EER and validate the end-to-end pipeline.
